name: tianshu
description: An open AI agent platform with a sidecar browser. Built in public.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/server && npm run test -w packages/web
